steps.title: Write the original total
steps.content:
The original lamp price is $l$, and the original clock price is $c$. Their combined original price is $80$, so
$$l+c=80$$

steps.title: Write the sale total
steps.content: A $20\%$ discount on the lamp means the customer pays $80\%$ of its original price, or $0.80l$. A $40\%$ discount on the clock means the customer pays $60\%$ of its original price, or $0.60c$. $$0.80l+0.60c=56$$ The answer is C.
